# coolify_cloud_tokens (Data Source)

Use this data source to list all Coolify cloud tokens.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "coolify_cloud_tokens" "all" {}

output "cloud_token_names" {
  value = [for t in data.coolify_cloud_tokens.all.cloud_tokens : t.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `cloud_tokens` (Attributes List) The list of cloud tokens. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--cloud_tokens))

<a id="nestedatt--cloud_tokens"></a>
### Nested Schema for `cloud_tokens`

Read-Only:

- `cloud_provider` (String) The cloud provider type.
- `name` (String) The name of the cloud token.
- `uuid` (String) The unique identifier of the cloud token.
